name: 16"x12" Novelty Shaped Bunny Throw Pillow Ivory - Room Essentials™
description:
Put a cute finishing touch on your Easter decor with this Novelty Shaped Bunny Throw Pillow from Room Essentials™. Made from recycled polyester faux-shearling fabric with ample polyester filling, this novelty throw pillow is designed as a fuzzy white bunny wearing a purple ribbon around its neck. Designed for indoor use only, you can place it on any bed, couch or armchair, and the sewn-seam closure lends it a neat, polished finish.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
